context: Bitcoin holds steady above $81k as Senate prepares to consider the CLARITY Act this week, potentially reshaping US crypto regulation. XRP surges 2.56% on institutional accumulation signals and the prospect of regulatory clarity. Market breadth remains positive with modest volume across major exchanges.

tickers.thesis: BTC consolidating above key support as macro backdrop improves; Senate CLARITY Act vote expected mid-week provides bullish catalyst. ICT OTE setup favors continuation above $80k with potential run toward $84-85k supply zone.
catalysts: Senate CLARITY Act markup scheduled May 14; passage would de-risk regulatory environment
CME OI positioning suggests institutional interest remains defensive; capitulation could trigger rally
US Treasury and Fed speakers throughout week; any dovish signals boost risk appetite
Potential ETF inflows if macro data softens expectations for rates
Technical break above $82k targets $85k supply zone with momentum

Ethereum staking flows remain positive; any yield-bearing products get boost from regulatory clarity

tickers.thesis: XRP exhibits strong momentum on whale accumulation (190M tokens) and imminent CLARITY Act regulatory tailwind. Institutional supply shock narrative combined with ICT breaker blocks at $1.38–$1.40 suggests continuation toward $1.65–$1.80 resistance cluster.

setup.entry: $1.42–$1.48 (limit buy into dip or market on break above $1.50)

insights.title: CLARITY Act Inflection Point This Week
insights.body: Senate markup scheduled May 14 represents a critical macro event for crypto. Passage would eliminate regulatory uncertainty that has plagued the space since 2023 and unlock institutional capital into XRP, DeFi, and Bitcoin. Market is pricing in 70%+ probability of favorable vote based on bipartisan support; failure would trigger 3-5% flash correction.

insights.title: XRP Whale Accumulation Signals Supply Shock
insights.body: Large holder positioning (190M tokens accumulated recently) combined with thin order book above $1.50 suggests liquidity vacuum ready to fill. ICT analysis confirms breaker block sweep at $1.38–$1.40 followed by institutional run toward $1.80 is highest-conviction setup in current market.

insights.title: Bitcoin Consolidation Building Base for $85k+ Push
insights.body: BTC holding above $81k on modest volume suggests smart money accumulation before macro catalysts. CME OI positioning remains defensive (put-heavy), but breaker block sweep potential and CLARITY Act passage could trigger gamma squeeze into $84–85k resistance zone by end of week.
